REQUIRED_FIELD_MSG = "Field '{}' is required and cannot be empty"


def validate_user(data):
    if not data.get("email"):
        raise ValueError(REQUIRED_FIELD_MSG.format("email"))
    if not data.get("name"):
        raise ValueError(REQUIRED_FIELD_MSG.format("name"))
    return True


def validate_order(data):
    if not data.get("customer_email"):
        raise ValueError(REQUIRED_FIELD_MSG.format("customer_email"))
    if not data.get("product_name"):
        raise ValueError(REQUIRED_FIELD_MSG.format("product_name"))
    return True


def validate_invoice(data):
    if not data.get("billing_email"):
        raise ValueError(REQUIRED_FIELD_MSG.format("billing_email"))
    if not data.get("line_items"):
        raise ValueError(REQUIRED_FIELD_MSG.format("line_items"))
    return True
